notes:
# Keen 0.12.4 — Image verification + privacy controls + attachment polish

Joint version-alignment release across `keen-frontend`, `keen-backend`, and `keen-releases` 0.12.4. The desktop client sat at 0.12.1 while the managed-fleet backend rolled forward to 0.12.2/0.12.3 to ship the tier1 hardening work; 0.12.4 catches the desktop side up so the version triple is back in lockstep, and bundles every desktop-side change shipped against backend 0.12.0–0.12.3.

## Highlights

### Security & trust

- **Image-verification panel (warn-only).** Settings → Server connection now compares the running managed backend's `/version.imageDigest` against the operator-signed allow-list manifest and surfaces the result. Re-runs verification when a fresh provisioning JWT lands, so token rotations don't leave a stale state.
- **`/api/transfer` hard-gate.** Managed-mode transfers refuse to start when image verification is in a `fail` state.
- **Postgres locked to loopback by default on managed VMs.** `flyctl proxy 5433:5432 -a keen-<user>` is closed for everyone except the operator's flagged debug machine. Existing managed machines converge to the locked-down default on next restart.

### Privacy

- **Sentry crash-reporting is now strictly opt-in (issue #19).** First-launch consent dialog defaults to **No**. Toggle is in Settings → General → Privacy and takes effect with no restart on either direction. Aligns the desktop app with the new privacy policy at https://thekeen.app/privacy (Section 5.4) ahead of public launch.

### Attachments & editor

- **Chat + markdown attachment pipeline** is now end-to-end stable: image / PDF / docx / xlsx uploads from the agent chat and the Milkdown editor, with this release adding responsive full-width image blocks, the WASM WebP encoder, and `attachment://` custom-scheme rendering inside Milkdown.
- **`FILE` knowledge type** is exposed in the type filter, type picker, and config (Paperclip icon).

### Keyboard

- **Single context-aware ⌘N for tasks.** ⌘N is now the only "Create" chord for tasks (the dedicated ⇧⌘N subtask binding is removed). On the task list ⌘N creates a new task; on Task Detail it adds a subtask, matching the "list = sibling, detail = child" pattern used for projects and milestones.

## Fixes

- `Tasks.test.tsx` and `Projects.test.tsx` failing CI on `Paperclip` import — both lucide-react test mocks were missing the icon.

---

Full per-PR history: see [`CHANGELOG.md`](https://github.com/saputello2/keen-frontend/blob/v0.12.4/CHANGELOG.md) on `keen-frontend`.
